---
agent: 'agent'
description: Refine frontend visual design with calmer colors and stable layout
---

Refine the visual design of the AI Readiness Assessment Portal.

Important:
- improve styling only
- do NOT change business logic
- do NOT change routing
- do NOT change API integration
- do NOT change DTOs / types / data flow
- do NOT change the structure of the current pages in a breaking way
- keep all current features working as they are

The current visual refresh made some things better, but several UI problems remain.

Problems to fix:
- buttons are too small or cramped and text is cut off
- hover on cards causes strange movement or unstable layout
- the blue accent color feels too harsh / cheap / уныло
- the page still looks flat and not polished enough
- the background is not attractive
- spacing and hierarchy can be improved
- overall design does not feel like a modern, calm, professional SaaS tool

Goal:
Make the app look more elegant, modern, calm, and visually balanced.

Desired style:
- a professional dashboard / internal SaaS feel
- calmer, more refined colors
- light but not empty background (for example a subtle warm gray / slate / neutral / off-white or a very soft gradient)
- white or slightly tinted cards with soft shadows and subtle borders
- no aggressive hover shifts or layout jumps
- rounded corners
- consistent spacing
- stronger typography hierarchy
- better badges / progress bars / buttons

Color direction:
- avoid the current harsh / overly bright blue
- use a calmer and more refined palette such as:
  - slate / zinc / neutral / stone
  - muted indigo / navy / teal / emerald accents
- completed / in-progress badges should feel more polished and subtle
- keep contrast accessible and the UI professional

Buttons:
- make buttons visually balanced and large enough
- text inside buttons must not be clipped
- improve padding, border radius, colors, hover states and overall presence
- primary buttons should feel professional, not toy-like
- secondary / completed action buttons should also look clean and consistent

Card behavior:
- remove or reduce any hover effect that causes layout shifts or awkward movement
- cards may have a very subtle shadow or border change on hover, but must remain stable
- make card content align better and feel less cramped

Typography:
- improve the page title and section titles
- make assessment title, labels, secondary text and metadata look more polished
- make readiness level and organization display more visually pleasant
- use muted text for labels and stronger text for values

Progress section:
- improve progress bar appearance and spacing
- keep percentages readable
- keep categories completion readable and consistent

Header / layout:
- keep the header and navigation
- improve spacing and active/inactive nav styling
- make the top-right action button (“New Assessment”) fit better into the layout
- overall page should feel balanced and professional

Do not overdesign:
- avoid flashy gradients or heavy glassmorphism
- avoid overly bright colors
- avoid unstable animations
- avoid cramped layout

Before applying changes:
1. list files to create or update
2. explain what visual refinements will be made
3. then apply the changes

After applying:
- summarize the styling improvements
- confirm that business logic and current functionality remain unchanged
